# Amend.sh

> Amend.sh turns scattered customer feedback into demand threads, links those threads to GitHub and Linear work, and closes the loop through roadmap, changelog, Slack, Discord, email, and in-app widget updates.

## Primary Resources

- [Product overview](https://amend.sh/): What Amend.sh does, who it is for, integrations, open-source self-hosting, core workflow, and pricing.
- [Brand guidelines](https://amend.sh/brand): Official Amend.sh logo, wordmark, and brand usage notes.
- [Embed demo](https://amend.sh/embed-demo): Runnable example of the Amend side-panel embed and hosted portal.
- [Public portal example](https://amend.sh/portal/amend-labs): Public changelog, roadmap, and feedback portal example.

## Documentation

- [Docs landing](https://docs.amend.sh): Public docs landing page for Amend.sh.
- [Docs index](https://docs.amend.sh/docs): Documentation index for Amend.sh.
- [Quickstart](https://docs.amend.sh/docs/quickstart): Prove a source-linked product update loop in local development.
- [Source trace](https://docs.amend.sh/docs/source-trace): How feedback, source work, releases, and customer updates stay connected.
- [Integration](https://docs.amend.sh/docs/integration): SDK, REST API, portal, GitHub, identity, and event integration surfaces.
- [Self-hosting](https://docs.amend.sh/docs/self-hosting): Run Amend with your own deployment and provider keys.
- [Launch](https://docs.amend.sh/docs/launch): Production launch checklist and readiness gates.

## Machine-readable Contracts

- [Agent-ready production report JSON Schema](https://docs.amend.sh/schemas/agent-ready-production-report.schema.json): Schema for CI/deploy readiness reports.
- [Agent-ready live report JSON Schema](https://docs.amend.sh/schemas/agent-ready-live-report.schema.json): Schema for live DNS, fetch, metadata, and AI crawler access reports.
- [Agent-ready status report JSON Schema](https://docs.amend.sh/schemas/agent-ready-status-report.schema.json): Schema for no-secret preflight status artifacts.
- [Agent-ready completion audit report JSON Schema](https://docs.amend.sh/schemas/agent-ready-completion-audit-report.schema.json): Schema for prompt-to-artifact completion audit reports.

## Notes For Agents

- Public marketing and docs pages are intended to be crawled and summarized.
- Amend.sh is open source and self-hostable, with hosted plans for teams that want managed infrastructure.
- Amend.sh is for modern founder-led, open-source, devtool, AI product, and small product teams using GitHub, Linear, Discord, Slack, support tools, and in-app feedback.
- Authenticated dashboard pages and API/auth routes are not useful citation targets.
- `llms.txt` is a navigation aid, not a guarantee of AI search inclusion.
